title: Funny_World(怪趣世界)
description:
为Minecraft增加一些有趣的东西，让平时的生存不再无聊
Add some interesting things to Minecraft to make usual survival less boring
body:
向Minecraft增加一些有趣的物品、附魔和一些原版物品的额外使用方法，让生存变得轻松有趣 内容包括： 摩擦起电附魔：可以空手摩擦方块获得电荷 电磁弓：将铁质物品高速发射 电磁TNT：爆炸时产生强大的电磁辐射并破坏红石元件 裂变附魔：箭射中生物后会向四周散射额外的箭 幽匿TNT：向周围的实体发射监守者的音波 红包：与村民建立良好的关系让交易打折 蓝冰靴子：冻结脚下的水，将熔岩，岩浆块转化为黑曜石 红砖、下界砖：可以扔出去对生物造成伤害 红砖盔甲、下界砖盔甲：受伤时向伤害来源发射对应的砖头 ……

具体内容可前往B站up1__G的视频

Adding some fun items, enchantments, and some extra ways to use vanilla items to Minecraft makes survival easy and fun Topics include: Friction Electrification Enchantment: You can rub a block with your bare hand to gain a charge Electromagnetic Bow: Fires iron objects at high speed Electromagnetic TNT: Explosive produces powerful electromagnetic radiation and destroys redstone components Fission Enchantment: Arrows that hit a creature scatter additional arrows in all directions Sculk TNT: Fires the Warden's sound waves at surrounding entities Red Envelopes: Build a good relationship with the villagers to get a discount on the trade Blue Ice Boots: Freezes the water beneath your feet and converts lava, magma blocks into obsidian Red Bricks, Nether Bricks: Can be thrown to deal damage to mobs Red Brick Armor, Nether Brick Armor: Fires the corresponding brick at the source of the damage when damaged ……

For specific content, please go to BiliBili to find video which made by 1__G
